prompt: When will Greg become a permanent host of the show?
expected_output: Eric said they were not committing to Greg as a permanent host. He did announce Greg was invited back as special guest co-host for episode 26, airing one week later. So the answer was no to permanence, yes to near-term continuation.
assertions: Answer captures the core SBS position on podcast host status
Answer includes key specific details, numbers, or mechanisms mentioned by the hosts
